title: geum riojense
intro: Geum riojense, also known as the Rioja avens, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Geum riojense include its potential to aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent wound infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
